requires.name: RESEND_API_KEY
requires.purpose: Authenticate server-side email delivery requests to Resend.

designModeBehavior: Render the full form UI, but submit stays in honest design mode: the local server route logs a no-op and returns a clear design-mode response. No provider request is sent and no fake success is shown.
integrationModeBehavior: Submit posts JSON to the generated local server route, which validates payload server-side and forwards the email delivery request to Resend using RESEND_API_KEY.
